description: Pollution vs development — choropleth, time series, scatter, decoupling.

stages.native:
SELECT m.year,
       c.iso2 AS country_iso2,
       m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3
FROM marts.country_year_environment m
JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
  ON c.iso3 = m.country_iso3
WHERE c.iso2 IN ('US','DE','CN','MX','IN','ZA')
  [[ AND c.iso2 IN ({{country_iso2}}) ]]
  AND m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY m.year, country_iso2

card.name: 04a — Índice GDP per capita (base 100) por país

stages.native:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT m.country_iso3, c.iso2 AS country_iso2, m.year,
         m.gdp_per_capita_usd, m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3,
         FIRST_VALUE(m.gdp_per_capita_usd) OVER (
           PARTITION BY m.country_iso3 ORDER BY m.year
         ) AS gdp_base,
         FIRST_VALUE(m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3) OVER (
           PARTITION BY m.country_iso3 ORDER BY m.year
         ) AS pm25_base
  FROM marts.country_year_environment m
  JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
    ON c.iso3 = m.country_iso3
  WHERE c.iso2 IN ('US','DE','CN','MX','IN','ZA')
    [[ AND c.iso2 IN ({{country_iso2}}) ]]
    AND m.gdp_per_capita_usd IS NOT NULL
    AND m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT year, country_iso2,
       100.0 * gdp_per_capita_usd / gdp_base AS gdp_index
FROM base
ORDER BY year, country_iso2

card.name: 03 — GDP vs PM2.5 (latest year, bubble = log population)

stages.native:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT m.country_iso3, m.country_name, m.year,
         m.gdp_per_capita_usd, m.median_pm25_ugm3, m.population_total,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY m.country_iso3 ORDER BY m.year DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM marts.country_year_environment m
  WHERE m.gdp_per_capita_usd IS NOT NULL
    AND m.median_pm25_ugm3 IS NOT NULL
    AND m.population_total IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT c.iso2 AS country_iso2,
       r.country_name, r.year,
       r.gdp_per_capita_usd, r.median_pm25_ugm3,
       r.population_total,
       LN(r.population_total) AS log_population
FROM ranked r
JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
  ON c.iso3 = r.country_iso3
WHERE r.rn = 1
  AND c.iso2 IN ('US','DE','CN','MX','IN','ZA')
  [[ AND c.iso2 IN ({{country_iso2}}) ]]
ORDER BY country_iso2

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT country_iso3, country_name, year,
         co2_per_capita_t, median_pm25_ugm3,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY country_iso3 ORDER BY year DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM marts.country_year_environment
  WHERE co2_per_capita_t IS NOT NULL
    AND median_pm25_ugm3 IS NOT NULL
    AND median_pm25_ugm3 > 0
    [[ AND year = {{year}} ]]
)
SELECT c.iso2                                      AS country_iso2,
       r.country_iso3,
       r.country_name,
       r.year                                      AS latest_year,
       r.co2_per_capita_t,
       r.median_pm25_ugm3,
       r.co2_per_capita_t / r.median_pm25_ugm3     AS ratio_co2_pm25
FROM ranked r
JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
  ON c.iso3 = r.country_iso3
WHERE r.rn = 1
ORDER BY country_iso2

SELECT m.year,
       c.iso2 AS country_iso2,
       m.gdp_growth_pct
FROM marts.country_year_environment m
JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
  ON c.iso3 = m.country_iso3
WHERE c.iso2 IN ('US','DE','CN','MX','IN','ZA')
  [[ AND c.iso2 IN ({{country_iso2}}) ]]
  AND m.gdp_growth_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY m.year, country_iso2

WITH base AS (
  SELECT m.country_iso3, c.iso2 AS country_iso2, m.year,
         m.gdp_per_capita_usd, m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3,
         FIRST_VALUE(m.gdp_per_capita_usd) OVER (
           PARTITION BY m.country_iso3 ORDER BY m.year
         ) AS gdp_base,
         FIRST_VALUE(m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3) OVER (
           PARTITION BY m.country_iso3 ORDER BY m.year
         ) AS pm25_base
  FROM marts.country_year_environment m
  JOIN seeds.country_iso_codes c
    ON c.iso3 = m.country_iso3
  WHERE c.iso2 IN ('US','DE','CN','MX','IN','ZA')
    [[ AND c.iso2 IN ({{country_iso2}}) ]]
    AND m.gdp_per_capita_usd IS NOT NULL
    AND m.pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT year, country_iso2,
       100.0 * pm25_annual_satellite_ugm3 / pm25_base AS pm25_index
FROM base
ORDER BY year, country_iso2

name: Climate vs Development

collection.description: Pollution vs development tiles for the climate-and-development project.
collection.name: Climate vs Development
